feedback_files.tests/test_settlement_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def open_database():
    db = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    db.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    for path in (
        "sql/001_schema.sql",
        "sql/010_batch_state.sql",
        "sql/020_posted_lines.sql",
    ):
        db.executescript((ROOT / path).read_text())
    return db


def balances(db):
    return dict(db.execute("SELECT wallet_id, settled_cents FROM wallet_totals"))


def test_relabeling_a_posted_batch_is_financially_inert():
    db = open_database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO wallets VALUES (?, ?)", [("cash", "Cash"), ("fees", "Fees")])
    db.execute("INSERT INTO settlement_batches VALUES ('close-7', 'draft', 'Close')")
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO settlement_lines VALUES (?, 'close-7', ?, ?)",
        [("c", "cash", 300), ("f", "fees", -300)],
    )
    db.execute("UPDATE settlement_batches SET status = 'posted' WHERE batch_id = 'close-7'")
    db.execute("UPDATE settlement_batches SET label = 'Corrected label' WHERE batch_id = 'close-7'")
    assert balances(db) == {"cash": 300, "fees": -300}


def test_reassigning_a_posted_line_moves_the_whole_effect():
    db = open_database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO wallets VALUES (?, ?)", [("old", "Old"), ("new", "New")])
    db.execute("INSERT INTO settlement_batches VALUES ('move-1', 'draft', 'Move')")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO settlement_lines VALUES ('move-line', 'move-1', 'old', 70)")
    db.execute("UPDATE settlement_batches SET status = 'posted' WHERE batch_id = 'move-1'")
    db.execute("UPDATE settlement_lines SET wallet_id = 'new' WHERE line_id = 'move-line'")
    assert balances(db) == {"old": 0, "new": 70}


def test_report_keeps_wallets_without_nonvoid_lines():
    db = open_database()
    db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO wallets VALUES (?, ?)",
        [("idle", "Idle"), ("retired", "Retired")],
    )
    db.execute("INSERT INTO settlement_batches VALUES ('old-1', 'draft', 'Old')")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO settlement_lines VALUES ('old-line', 'old-1', 'retired', 15)")
    db.execute("UPDATE settlement_batches SET status = 'posted' WHERE batch_id = 'old-1'")
    db.execute("UPDATE settlement_batches SET status = 'void' WHERE batch_id = 'old-1'")
    rows = db.execute((ROOT / "sql/wallet_report.sql").read_text()).fetchall()
    assert [(row["wallet_id"], row["settled_cents"], row["draft_cents"]) for row in rows] == [
        ("idle", 0, 0),
        ("retired", 0, 0),
    ]
